args.CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough: Integrations Section - Animated Beam Design

Successfully restored the animated beam layout and rebuilt the integrations block in [features-section-14.tsx](file:///e:/AI%20GREEN%20TICK/components/shadcn-studio/blocks/features-section-14/features-section-14.tsx).

## Changes Made

### 1. Updated Header Information
- Configured a green tag badge: `:: INTEGRATIONS ::`.
- Set main H2 to: `Plays nicely with your stack`.
- Set subtext description: `Connect AI Greentick with 100+ tools — your CRM, store, and automation platform are one click away.`.

### 2. Restored Animated Beam Design (Desktop View)
- Restored the high-fidelity, interactive animated beam design matching the style of the original diagram.
- Configured 12 integration nodes:
  - **Left Column**: Shopify, WooCommerce, HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, Razorpay.
  - **Right Column**: Zapier, Google Sheets, Pabbly, Make, Klaviyo, Calendly.
  - **Center Column**: Large pulsing green hub node containing the official `LogoVector` logo.
- Connected all 12 nodes using `<AnimatedBeam>` paths that render custom flowing green lasers merging into the center node at various curved paths (`curvature` adjusted from `10` to `60`).
- Applied hover states on each integration card (tinted green borders and titles).

### 3. Configured Mobile Grid Fallback
- For viewports below desktop breakpoint (`lg`), the layout automatically transitions to a clean, bordered 2-to-4 column grid showing the 12 brand icons and titles.

### 4. Integrated Action CTA Button
- Positioned a centered outline CTA button at the bottom: `View all integrations →`.

## Verification & Validation

### Build Compilation
- Verified production compiler using `npm run build` which succeeded without errors:
  ```bash
  ▲ Next.js 16.1.7 (Turbopack)
  ✓ Compiled successfully in 2.9s
  Running TypeScript ...
  Route (app)  Size     First Load JS
  ┌ ○ /        128 kB         236 kB
  └ ○ /_not-found
  ```
"
